'''Vel Ardox''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Blubreen]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Like all members of her species, Ardox could breathe under water; she was also a skilled [[Technician/Legends|technician]].

==Biography==
Brought into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] after being discovered to be a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] during infancy, Ardox entered into the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] to begin her [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. After [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduating]] and being selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|master]], Ardox traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] with her teacher on missions from the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. After passing her [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]], Ardox was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|elevated]] to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and began accepting solo missions.<ref name="SFTLJ" />

During her service to the Order, Councilor [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] went missing during an [[Episode I Adventures 1: Search for the Lost Jedi|assignment]] on [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]]. Under the leadership of Master [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], Ardox joined Padawan [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and fellow Knight [[Noro Zak]] in the search for the High Councilor. While investigating a company called [[Trinkatta Starships]], the Jedi team was ambushed by [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]] stationed there. During the commotion, Master Jinn slipped away to locate Gallia while Ardox aided in defeating the droids. As they fought, Master Jinn managed to find Gallia and shut down the [[Droid control program|droid control center]], disabling the Jedi's opponents. Jinn soon picked up his fellow Jedi in a [[T-16 skyhopper/Legends|T-16 skyhopper]] and assigned Ardox and Zak the task of taking Gallia to the [[Jedi chapter house (Rhinnal)|Jedi medical academy]] on [[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]].<ref name="SFTLJ" />

Leaving the Master/Padawan team on Esseles, Ardox and Zak flew to Rhinnal with Gallia and were greeted by the [[Jedi healer/Legends|healers]] there. During their stay at the academy, communications were knocked out by a storm, causing the Jedi on Esseles to believe Rhinnal was under attack. Rushing to aid Rhinnal, Jinn and Kenobi found all to be well, with Gallia healing quickly.

While on the planet, Jinn informed Ardox and Zak that a group of [[Bartokk]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] had stolen several [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]-equipped [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class droid starfighters]], modified by Trinkatta, to attack the [[Corulag Academy|Academy]] of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]]. With Gallia completely healed, the group agreed to meet [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] on Corulag. Their mission was to rescue the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] infant [[Teela Panjarra]] from the Chief Scientist of the Academy's Science Services, [[Frexton]]. Like the scientist [[Jenna Zan Arbor]], who had [[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment|held Jinn ten years before]], Frexton hoped to unlock the secrets of the Force with the child. While their initial rescue mission was foiled by the Bartokk assassins, Grand Master Yoda found Panjarra and defeated the Bartokk. With Panjarra safe, the Jedi returned to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
